infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: InkSpred shows tattoo artists and studios near you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: InkSpred lets you take photos of tattoos and reference images to share with your artist.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: InkSpred lets you upload tattoo reference photos and portfolio images from your photo library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: InkSpred can save tattoo designs and aftercare guides to your photo library.
